errors: Incorrect mapping of thread IDs to A tile loading and retrieval. The kernel loads A using tid as index but later retrieves using localRow (tid/8), causing mismatched data and undefined behavior.
suggested_fixes: Fix the A tile loading: either load As using localRow = tid / BLOCK_N, or change retrieval to use threadIdx.x directly. Ensure the mapping is consistent.
Add CUDA error checking after kernel launch (e.g., cudaGetLastError()).
Consider accumulating partial sums in a local register and writing to Y once after the loop to reduce global memory traffic.
warnings: No CUDA error checking after kernel launch.
Kernel writes to Y multiple times (per chunk) instead of accumulating in register and writing once.
